# Tinybird LLM Agent Sitemap

## About Tinybird

Tinybird is a real-time data platform that helps developers build real-time data products and APIs. It provides a serverless platform for ingesting, transforming, and serving real-time data through APIs.

### Core Value Proposition
Tinybird provides infrastructure and tooling to build, deploy, and iterate real-time APIs over massive data sets. Get fastest-database-in-the-world performance with zero maintenance overhead, query billions of rows in milliseconds with 99.9% uptime.

### Core Features
- Real-time data ingestion and processing
- SQL-based data transformations
- Instant API generation
- Serverless architecture
- Built-in monitoring and observability
- Native integrations with popular data sources

### Key Capabilities
1. Hosted OLAP Database
  - Incremental Materialized Views for 100x query speed
  - Automatic view updates
  - Zero maintenance overhead
  - 99.9% uptime guarantee

2. Real-time APIs
  - Deploy any query as a scalable OpenAPI endpoint
  - Auto-generated Swagger docs
  - Built-in observability
  - Dynamic query parameters
  - Token-based auth and rate-limiting
  - Scale to 1k+ RPS at sub-second latency

3. Events API
  - Stream JSON at 1K+ RPS
  - Direct POST from apps or serverless functions
  - No complex streaming infrastructure needed

4. Developer Experience
  - Complete CLI for local development
  - Data defined as code
  - Git-based version control
  - Painless schema migrations
  - Built-in observability
  - AI-powered development with vibe code

## Tinybird Documentation
The documentation for the product is available at https://www.tinybird.co/docs and you can have more context about it there. Also, check the https://www.tinybird.co/docs/llms.txt and https://www.tinybird.co/docs/llms-full.txt for more context about the product.

## Static Pages

- [Tinybird · Ship faster with Managed ClickHouse®](https://www.tinybird.co/)
  - The data infrastructure and tooling to ship enterprise grade analytical features faster and at a fraction of the cost

- [AI Developer Experience - ClickHouse for Developers & Agents | Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/product/ai)
  - Build, test, and ship real-time analytics with local dev, branches, CI/CD, and AI agent skills. All the power of ClickHouse, none of the ops.

- [Pricing · Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/pricing)
  - Tinybird's pricing scales elastically based on compute, so you pay based on the value and insights delivered to your users.

- [Data Ingestion - Any Source, Real-Time, Fully Managed | Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/product/ingest)
  - Ingest data from any source into Tinybird: Events API, Kafka, S3, GCS, and files. Real-time, reliable, and fully managed. Start ingesting in minutes.

- [Query — SQL APIs, BI Tools & MCP Server | Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/product/query)
  - Publish low-latency SQL APIs, connect BI tools like Grafana and Tableau, or let AI agents query your data through MCP. One platform, every interface.

- [Instant SQL APIs · Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/product/instant-sql-apis)
  - Turn SQL into an endpoint or lambda. Deploy analytics APIs in seconds.

- [Managed ClickHouse for Developers · Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/product/managed-clickhouse)
  - Tinybird is a managed ClickHouse service for AI-native software teams. Get the performance of ClickHouse without the pain of managing it, and focus on shipping your use case, not scaling a new database.

- [High Availability · Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/product/high-availability)
  - Your analytics infrastructure should never go down. Tinybird is built so it doesn't — distributed, redundant, and self-healing from the ground up.

- [Schema Iteration · Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/product/schema-iteration)
  - Safe migrations with zero downtime. Evolve your data model in production.

- [Security and compliance · Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/product/security-and-compliance)
  - Enterprise-grade security and compliance. Trust and reliability built-in.

- [Separation of Compute · Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/product/separation-of-compute)
  - Scale with zero-copy replication. Keep workloads isolated for predictable performance.

- [BI & Tool Connections · Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/product/direct-db-connection)
  - Connect your BIs, ORMs, and favorite tools. Native connection to your analytics database.

- [Blog · Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/blog)
  - Musings on transformations, tables and everything in between.

- [Customer Stories · Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/customer-stories)
  - We help software teams ship features with massive data sets.

- [Templates · Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/templates)
  - Explore our collection of templates

- [About us · Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/about)
  - We build tools developers love, and data teams trust. Tinybird isn't just a fast database. Tinybird makes YOU faster.

- [Contact Sales · Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/contact-us)
  - Get in touch with our sales team.

- [ClickHouse® for Developers • Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/clickhouse-for-developers)
  - A video series for developers that simplifies ClickHouse and teaches how to build fast, efficient analytics products.

- [Tinybird Builds • Live coding with Tinybird and friends](https://www.tinybird.co/builds)
  - Subscribe to Tinybird Builds, featuring live builds of real-time analytics projects from end to end. Learn how to master ClickHouse live.

- [Observability · Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/observability)
  - The Simple, High‑Performance Observability Stack

## Templates

- [OpenTelemetry](https://www.tinybird.co/templates/opentelemetry)
  - Instrument your application with Tinybird and OpenTelemetry
  - Categories: monitoring, opentelemetry, foundation

  - Build your own real-time web analytics app using Tinybird
  - Categories: dashboard, nextjs, starter, foundation, analytics

  - Build your own analytics agent using Tinybird
  - Categories: ai, starter, agno, slack, python

  - Build your own real-time logs explorer using Tinybird
  - Categories: dashboard, nextjs, starter, foundation, analytics

  - Categories: dashboard, nextjs, starter, foundation, analytics, ai, clerk

  - Categories: monitoring, datadog, grafana, organizations, foundation

  - Categories: ghost, foundation, analytics

  - Categories: analytics, starter, nextjs

  - Build an AI email assistant to reach inbox zero
  - Categories: analytics, starter, nextjs, ai

  - Categories: jwt, demo, clerk

- [Auth0 JWT](https://www.tinybird.co/templates/auth0-jwt)
  - Build multi-tenant apps with Auth0 and Tinybird
  - Categories: jwt, demo, auth0

## Blog Posts

- [Hunting orphan objects: 45% off our ClickHouse storage bill (and a near data-loss incident)](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/how-we-deal-with-cloud-orphan-objects)
  - How we tracked down petabytes of orphaned objects in our ClickHouse clusters, recovered tens of thousands of dollars in monthly storage costs, and hardened our cleanup and recovery procedures after almost losing data along the way.
  - Published: 2026-05-19 00:00:00

- [No more QPS limits on Developer Plans](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/new-developer-plan-pricing)
  - We're removing QPS limits from Developer Plans and switching to vCPU-based billing. Pay for the compute you use, not the number of requests you make.
  - Published: 2026-05-18 00:00:00

- [From 48 Seconds to 130 Milliseconds: Vector Search in Tinybird](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/vector-search-improvements)
  - A customer needed semantic search over 20 million embeddings. Their first attempt timed out. Three changes turned it into sub-200ms queries. Here's what we learned.
  - Published: 2026-05-12 00:00:00

- [How to handle analytics workloads in Postgres without slowing down transactions](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/analytics-workloads-postgres)
  - Analytics queries and transactional queries compete for the same I/O, memory, and connections in Postgres. Here's how to isolate them — and when to stop fighting the architecture.
  - Published: 2026-05-11 00:00:00

- [How to make your SQL database faster](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/how-to-make-sql-database-faster)
  - Most SQL performance problems come from the same handful of causes. Here's how to diagnose and fix them, and when the problem isn't query optimization at all.
  - Published: 2026-05-11 00:00:00

- [Project Kijiji: building a GNN-based routing intelligence platform for fragile networks](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/project-kijiji-gnn-routing-intelligence)
  - How a GNN-based platform uses Tinybird to map African internet routing inefficiencies and predict where new IXP peering agreements would have the highest regional impact.
  - Published: 2026-05-08 00:00:00

- [clickhouse integration fivetran — 3 Ways to Connect in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/clickhouse-integration-fivetran)
  - Load data into ClickHouse® from Fivetran via the native ClickHouse® destination, a custom webhook destination, or a Tinybird intermediary. Pick the right clickhouse integration fivetran path.
  - Published: 2026-05-02 00:00:00

- [Tinybird vs. ClickHouse®: What's the difference?](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/tinybird-vs-clickhouse)
  - ClickHouse® is an open source columnar database. Tinybird is a data platform built on ClickHouse® with developer tooling, SDKs, and infrastructure abstractions for building real-time analytics APIs.
  - Published: 2026-04-17 00:00:00

- [Tinybird is now available in AWS ap-southeast-2 (Sydney)](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/tinybird-is-now-available-in-aws-ap-southeast-2)
  - Tinybird now supports AWS ap-southeast-2. Lower latency for Australia and Oceania workloads and data residency in Sydney.
  - Published: 2026-04-14 00:00:00

- [Finding and fixing bugs in ClickHouse®'s Alias table engine](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/fixing-clickhouse-alias-dependency-bug)
  - We've been testing ClickHouse®'s experimental Alias table engine. We found bugs in how DDL dependencies are tracked and in how materialized views are triggered and shipped a fix upstream for the former.
  - Published: 2026-04-13 00:00:00

- [clickhouse integration grafana — 3 Ways to Connect in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/clickhouse-integration-grafana)
  - Connect Grafana to ClickHouse® via the native plugin, Tinybird Infinity datasource, or ClickHouse® Cloud. Pick the right clickhouse integration grafana path.
  - Published: 2026-04-13 00:00:00

- [clickhouse integration looker studio — 3 ways in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/clickhouse-integration-looker-studio)
  - Connect Looker Studio to ClickHouse® via Community Connector, Tinybird REST API, or JDBC bridge. Pick the right clickhouse integration looker studio path.
  - Published: 2026-04-13 00:00:00

- [clickhouse integration metabase — 3 Ways to Connect in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/clickhouse-integration-metabase)
  - Connect Metabase to ClickHouse® via JDBC driver, Tinybird REST API, or ClickHouse® Cloud connector. Pick the right clickhouse integration metabase path.
  - Published: 2026-04-13 00:00:00

- [clickhouse integration power bi — 3 Ways to Connect in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/clickhouse-integration-power-bi)
  - Connect Power BI to ClickHouse® via ODBC, Tinybird REST API, or ClickHouse® Cloud connector. Pick the right clickhouse integration power bi path.
  - Published: 2026-04-13 00:00:00

- [PostgreSQL horizontal scaling — 3 approaches in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/postgresql-horizontal-scaling)
  - PostgreSQL horizontal scaling options compared: read replicas, Citus sharding, and analytical offload to ClickHouse®. Choose the right approach for your throughput and latency requirements.
  - Published: 2026-04-13 00:00:00

- [PostgreSQL vertical scaling — 3 approaches in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/postgresql-vertical-scaling)
  - PostgreSQL vertical scaling options compared: hardware and config tuning, connection pooling with query optimization, and analytical offload to ClickHouse®. Know when vertical hits its ceiling.
  - Published: 2026-04-13 00:00:00

- [real time error monitoring — 3 ways to implement in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/real-time-error-monitoring)
  - Real time error monitoring options compared: Sentry and ELK stack, ClickHouse® with Grafana for high-volume logs, and Tinybird API-first for embedded error analytics. Pick the right architecture.
  - Published: 2026-04-13 00:00:00

- [Tinybird is now available in AWS ap-east-1 (Hong Kong)](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/tinybird-is-now-available-in-aws-ap-east-1)
  - Tinybird now supports AWS ap-east-1. Lower latency for APAC workloads and data residency in Hong Kong.
  - Published: 2026-04-07 00:00:00

- [ClickHouse® integration R — 3 Ways to Connect in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/clickhouse-integration-r)
  - Explore ClickHouse® integration R options—direct HTTP SQL, Tinybird Pipes REST APIs, or bulk inserts. Pick based on latency, effort, and ops.
  - Published: 2026-04-06 00:00:00

- [ClickHouse® integration ruby — 3 Ways to Connect in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/clickhouse-integration-ruby)

  - Published: 2026-04-06 00:00:00

- [ClickHouse® integration scala — 3 Ways to Connect in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/clickhouse-integration-scala)
  - Explore ClickHouse® integration scala options—JDBC queries, Tinybird Pipes REST APIs, or JDBC batch inserts. Pick by latency, effort, and ops.
  - Published: 2026-04-06 00:00:00

- [ClickHouse® integration tableau — 3 Ways to Connect in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/clickhouse-integration-tableau)
  - Connect Tableau to ClickHouse® via JDBC/ODBC, Tinybird API, or native connector. Pick the right ClickHouse® integration tableau path.
  - Published: 2026-04-06 00:00:00

- [ClickHouse® + Elasticsearch — 3 Ways to Connect in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/clickhouse-integration-elasticsearch)
  - Get Elasticsearch data into ClickHouse® for analytics. Tinybird, ClickPipes Kafka, or self-managed—compare the three options and choose the right pipeline architecture.
  - Published: 2026-03-30 00:00:00

- [ClickHouse® + InfluxDB — 3 Ways to Connect in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/clickhouse-integration-influxdb)
  - Get InfluxDB time-series data into ClickHouse® for analytics. Tinybird, ClickPipes Kafka, or self-managed—compare the three options and choose the right pipeline architecture.

- [ClickHouse® + Snowflake — 3 Ways to Connect in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/clickhouse-integration-snowflake)
  - Get Snowflake data into ClickHouse® for real-time analytics. Tinybird, ClickPipes S3, or self-managed—compare the three options and choose the right pipeline architecture.
  - Published: 2026-03-30 00:00:00

- [Data Visualization for Performance Reporting and Dashboards](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/data-visualization-for-performance-reporting-and-dashboards)
  - Data Visualization for Performance Reporting and Dashboards needs the right tool for each layer. Learn how to separate UI, real-time query serving, and streaming-derived data product outputs, then shortlist options.
  - Published: 2026-03-30 00:00:00

- [Streaming Data Processing Tools Compared: Brokers, Engines, and Real-Time Serving](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/kafka-alternatives-for-streaming-data-processing-8-tools-compared)
  - Top tools for streaming data processing go beyond Kafka alternatives. This map separates message brokers (Kafka, Redpanda, Pulsar), stream processing engines (Flink, Beam, ksqlDB), streaming SQL/incremental views (Materialize, RisingWave), and real-time analytics/serving (Druid, ClickHouse Cloud, Tinybird). Choose based on the bottleneck: backbone, stateful processing, continuously updated query state, or user-facing serving.
  - Published: 2026-03-30 00:00:00

- [PostgreSQL for OLTP and Analytics: 8 Real Options Compared](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/postgresql-for-oltp-and-analytics-8-options-compared)
  - If you need one PostgreSQL-compatible environment for both OLTP and analytics, you are dealing with a mixed-workload problem. This guide groups realistic options into single-environment Postgres-compatible engines, stay-in-Postgres tradeoffs, and split OLTP/analytics architectures.
  - Published: 2026-03-30 00:00:00

- [Smarter deployments in Tinybird: faster schema changes for the most common operations](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/smarter-deployments-with-alter)
  - Most schema changes don't need a full table rebuild. We added ALTER TABLE support to Tinybird deployments so simple changes deploy in seconds, not minutes.
  - Published: 2026-03-25 00:00:00

- [Maple: an open-source observability platform built with Tinybird's TypeScript SDK](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/maple)
  - David Granzin built Maple, an open-source observability platform for metrics, logs, and traces, using Tinybird's TypeScript SDK. Zero infrastructure to manage, AI agents accelerating development, and two projects shipped simultaneously.
  - Published: 2026-03-24 11:00:00

- [OpenAI scaling PostgreSQL: lessons and alternatives](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/openai-scaling-postgresql)
  - OpenAI scaling PostgreSQL revealed the real limits of Postgres under extreme write and analytical load. Learn what they did, where it breaks, and what alternatives engineers use.
  - Published: 2026-03-24 00:00:00

- [How to implement real-time analytics in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/real-time-analytics-implementation)
  - Learn how to implement **real-time analytics** with predictable latency and production-ready APIs using Tinybird, ClickPipes, or self-managed pipelines on ClickHouse®.
  - Published: 2026-03-24 00:00:00

- [How to create real-time dashboards from high-volume time-series data in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/real-time-dashboards-high-volume-time-series-data)
  - Learn how to create **real-time dashboards from high-volume time-series data** with predictable latency using Tinybird, ClickPipes, or a self-managed ClickHouse® pipeline.
  - Published: 2026-03-24 00:00:00

- [How to deploy a real-time recommendation engine with AI in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/real-time-recommendation-engine-ai)
  - Learn how to deploy a **real-time recommendation engine with AI** with predictable latency using Tinybird, ClickPipes, or a self-managed ClickHouse® pipeline.
  - Published: 2026-03-24 00:00:00

- [Scaling Postgres to billions of rows in 2026](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/scaling-postgres-to-billions-of-rows)
  - Scaling Postgres to billions of rows means dealing with autovacuum, table bloat, and query latency. Learn when to optimize within Postgres and when to offload analytics to ClickHouse®.
  - Published: 2026-03-24 00:00:00

- [Cluster management is now scriptable](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/cluster-management-api)
  - Replica management in dedicated clusters is now available via API. Rebalance weights, add replicas, remove replicas. All scriptable.
  - Published: 2026-03-19 00:00:00

- [Data Previews](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/previews-branches)
  - Your app gets preview deployments per PR. Now your data layer does too. One CI command, automatic branch resolution, zero config.
  - Published: 2026-03-13 12:00:00

- [A unified logs explorer for your entire Tinybird workspace](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/new-logs-explorer)
  - Endpoint requests, ingestion operations, Kafka messages, sink executions, and job runs. Five sources, one page, zero tab-switching.
  - Published: 2026-03-12 12:00:00

- [A redesigned Tinybird UI for developers and operators](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/new-ui)
  - A faster, information-dense UI to operate your Tinybird workspaces and clusters.
  - Published: 2026-03-11 12:00:00

- [Tinybird, now Python-native too](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/python-sdk)
  - Define datasources, pipes, and endpoints as Python code. Get typed ingestion, IDE autocomplete, and a language your coding agent already understands.
  - Published: 2026-03-10 12:00:00

- [CLI 4.0: A better workflow for agents and humans](https://www.tinybird.co/blog/md/cli-4)
